# Apollo — Capability Profile

## Use Case Coverage

| Use Case | Rating | Notes |
|----------|--------|-------|
| [[prospecting]] | ✓ | 65+ filters (job title, seniority level, location, company size, past titles, department, Boolean search), 450M+ database, intent signals (6–12 topics), lookalikes, waterfall enrichment, AI lead scoring. Confirmed: seniority levels include Owner, Founder, C-Suite, Partner, VP, Director, Manager, Entry, Intern |
| [[email-verification]] | ✓ | 91% accuracy claimed (97% per marketing); auto credit refund on bounce; propagates to all customers |
| [[email-warmup]] | ✓ | SMTP-based email warmup with managed inbox network (sends/receives warmup messages automatically); automatic ramping and reply simulation; 1 mailbox free for paid users; additional mailboxes pricing TBD. Launched 2024-2025. Verified via apollo.io/email-deliverability and knowledge base May 2026. |
| [[personalisation]] | ✓ | AI Writing / AI Copilot; AI Email Writer; dynamic variables; multi-language |
| [[campaign-sequence]] | ✓ | Multi-step sequences; email + LinkedIn tasks + dialer; A/B testing; smart send times (Pro+); calendar integration |
| [[inbox-reply-management]] | ✓ | Unified Inbox across all mailboxes; team assignment; sentiment analysis; behavioral conditions |

## Prospecting Filter Examples

**Example 1: Managing Directors in Hong Kong**
- Job Title: `"Managing Director"` (exact match)
- Location: `Hong Kong`
- OR use Boolean search: `"Managing Director" OR "MD" OR "Managing Dir"`

**Example 2: Directors across specific industries**
- Job Title: `"Director"`
- Check "Include people with similar titles" to expand results
- Industry filters available
- Can exclude specific titles

**Filter Types Confirmed**
- ✓ Job titles (with Boolean operators: AND, OR, NOT)
- ✓ Seniority levels (Owner, Founder, C-Suite, Partner, VP, Director, Manager, Entry, Intern)
- ✓ Location (country, region, city level)
- ✓ Company size
- ✓ Department / job function
- ✓ Past job titles
- ✓ Exclude filters
- ✓ Save and reuse searches

Source: Apollo Knowledge Base + YouTube documentation (as of 2026-05-04)

## Vendor Type
Full-stack + CRM: the strongest all-in-one combining prospecting database, sequencing, CRM, and analytics under one roof.

## Best For
Teams that want a single platform for their entire outbound stack — especially where a lead database + CRM integration matters. Strongest choice when ICP filter depth and intent signals are priorities.

## Limitations
- Per-user seat pricing scales up quickly for larger teams
- Email verification accuracy (91%) lower than specialist tools like Prospeo (98%) or MillionVerifier (99%)
- LinkedIn automation within sequences is task-based (prompts user) rather than fully automated like Lemlist
- Email warm-up is relatively new (launched 2024-2025); some users report "okay but not great for high-volume cold email" vs. dedicated tools
- Additional mailbox warm-up pricing beyond the first free mailbox is not documented — verify with Apollo support
- Export credits (3,000/year on Basic per knowledge base) may differ from total credits (30,000/year per pricing page) — exact split unconfirmed; verify with Apollo support
